overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins transitioning from a rural Egyptian village with wooden huts and palm trees to the grand stone architecture of the Library of Alexandria. The third-person perspective follows the character exploring both environments under bright sunny conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village with wooden huts and palm grove

agents.ego_description: hooded character in brown robes walking slowly through a rustic village setting with wooden structures

entered.detail: rustic structure with thatched roof and wooden support beams
tall palm trees visible in the background against the sky
unfinished wooden structure with beams and supports
uneven dirt trail with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit rural Egyptian village. The character stands near a rustic wooden hut surrounded by palm trees and vegetation. A dirt path leads through the scene, and wooden scaffolding is visible to the left. The atmosphere is quiet and pastoral.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand classical library courtyard with colonnades and marble statues

events.description: hard cut from rural village to the grand plaza of the Library of Alexandria with classical stone architecture
horse rider crosses the plaza from right to left in front of the character

agents.ego_description: armored character with round shield and spear walking steadily across the stone plaza toward the library entrance

notable_agents.action: horse rider galloping across the plaza from right to left
citizen in white tunic walking past the character toward the left

entered.detail: massive stone building with tall columns, triangular pediments, and classical Greco-Roman architecture
ornate stone archway with decorative carvings marking the plaza entrance
white marble statues flanking the approach to the library entrance
tall dark stone obelisk with hieroglyphic carvings
red vertical banners hanging from the library facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the magnificent Library of Alexandria, showcasing grand stone columns and marble statues under a clear blue sky. The character walks across the paved plaza toward the main entrance, passing citizens in ancient dress. A horse rider gallops across the plaza, and the camera approaches the imposing facade with its red banners and classical architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet, pastoral Egyptian village into the grand, imposing architecture of the Library of Alexandria. It begins in a sunlit rural setting, moving past rustic wooden huts, palm trees, and scaffolding along a dusty dirt path. As the environment shifts, the rustic vegetation gives way to a vast paved plaza characterized by magnificent stone columns and marble statues under a clear blue sky. The camera then glides through a crowd of citizens and past a galloping horse rider, finally approaching the imposing facade of the library marked by classical architecture and flowing red banners.
